title: fragaria nitida
intro: Fragaria nitida, also known as the glossy strawberry or fragrant strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the southeastern United States. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which have been used to treat various ailments, including fever and rheumatism. The health benefits of Fragaria nitida include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
